title: Tangy Redcurrant Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and tangy Indian-inspired chicken curry made with redcurrants for a sweet and sour twist.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened (5 minutes).
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken and cook until browned (5 minutes).
Add the redcurrants, curry leaves, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in a little water if the sauce thickens too much.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
